items.primaryCorrection: Grind one step finer or keep the closed/contact phase 10 seconds longer if chamber load is still safe.
items.backupCorrection: Use a slightly slower open pour before changing temperature.
items.guardrail: Do not change dose or ratio first, and do not exceed safe chamber load.

items.primaryCorrection: Improve saturation and add a little more controlled contact before changing dose.
items.backupCorrection: If the valve path is mostly open, use Hybrid Balanced instead of pure V60 Mode.
items.guardrail: Keep dose, ratio, hot-water split, and dripper size locked.

items.primaryCorrection: Grind one step coarser or open/release 10 seconds earlier.
items.backupCorrection: Reduce final agitation and avoid holding a full closed chamber too long.
items.guardrail: Do not dilute or change ratio as the first fix.

items.primaryCorrection: Coarsen slightly and release earlier so fines do not sit in a drying bed.
items.backupCorrection: Use lower agitation and keep the valve transition clean.
items.guardrail: Do not add bypass water unless the deterministic iced plan already includes it.

items.primaryCorrection: Reduce closed load or open earlier; keep the slurry calmer.
items.backupCorrection: Grind slightly coarser and avoid extra swirl after release.
items.guardrail: Never overfill Switch 02/MUGEN to chase body.

items.primaryCorrection: Release earlier or choose Hybrid Bright Clean if the water is high-buffer.
items.backupCorrection: Check KH/alkalinity and use manual minerals before changing the recipe ratio.
items.guardrail: Treat flatness as contact/water/preset first, not a dose change.

items.primaryCorrection: Keep the same grind, valve path, and release checkpoint for the next brew.
items.backupCorrection: Record water, grinder, and drawdown as the calibration baseline.
items.guardrail: Do not optimise away a good cup.
